# Mashed RE — Shared Struct Documentation

**Generated by:** Session 6 (frontend_struct_extract), 2026-05-11  
**Source sessions:** hud_frontend (d1–d4), hud_ingame (d1–d3), c0_promotion_frontend_a  
**S-DoD requirement addressed:** #3 — all shared structs touched by the frontend subsystem documented field-by-field with first-read/write RVA citations.

---

## Files

| File | Base address | Description |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| [frontend_state.md](frontend_state.md) | 0x008a9584 / 0x007f1a0c / 0x007f0fd0 / 0x0067ec.. | Frontend state machine, player-slot mode selector, game-mode globals, per-player bar values, score rank arrays, profile sub-state |
| [rwim2d_vertex_buffer.md](rwim2d_vertex_buffer.md) | 0x00898a20 | Shared RwIm2DVertex[4] buffer used by all Im2D draw helpers; RW device vtable offsets |
| [lobby_slot_array.md](lobby_slot_array.md) | 0x007f0a44 / 0x007f0e50 / 0x008989e0 / 0x007e96fc | Lobby/player-slot-state array, vehicle unlock flag table, lap-time records, input-device type table |
| [hud_ingame_element.md](hud_ingame_element.md) | 0x0063cab8 / 0x0063ce20 / 0x0063d298 | HUD ingame element structs (3 variants: stride 0x16C, 0x114, 0x160) |

## Open uncertainties (new struct-level; no U-ID assigned yet)

The following uncertainties arose at the struct-aggregation level and do not yet have U-IDs.  
They should be assigned IDs and added to UNCERTAINTIES.md via `/re-classify` before S-DoD is claimed.

| Tentative | Struct | Statement |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| TBD | HudIngameElement_114 | Field +0x50 semantics: used as inner index for doubly-indirect dispatch in FUN_0041c9a0; meaning unknown |
| TBD | HudIngameElement_A | Guard region +0x00..+0x0F: not dispatched by any observed function; may hold struct type tag or active-element count |
| TBD | FrontendStateMachine | Gaps at +0x20..+0x23 (between subState7 and timerAccum): not observed in any plate; content unknown |
| TBD | PlayerSlotArray | Fields +0x04 and +0x0C within each 0x10-byte slot entry: never observed in any plate |
